title: Forms : Same questions/columns, different options per condition

posts.author: Kinsey (Kinsey Davis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
This might be a two fold function:
Could there be a way to have a setting in forms that you can set the question to reflect in a specific column? And/or can there be a way that the question on the form can only show specific entries based on a condition but still reflect to the same assigned column?

For example/some clarity: I have form that I would like customers to fill out for designing a home. Each house has a kitchen, bathroom, etc (these would be my columns) but the selections in each room might differ between neighborhoods. So in one neighborhood the kitchen can have a better tile then another neighborhood. I want to be able to have the same room (column) but different options conditional on the neighborhood and once the form is submitted I don’t want to have a “Kitchen” column for 10 different neighborhoods. I just want the form to submit whatever the specified selection is into 1 “Kitchen” column.

If anyone has any workarounds or solutions please let me know!
